# EILLON — full answer brief

Last updated: 2026-07-10
Version: 2.1.0

## Overview

EILLON is an independent perfume maison in Copenhagen composing oil-rich parfums from Afro-Mediterranean memory. Chapters are released in deliberate windows; the site documents studio proof, wear guidance, and chapter lifecycle without mass-market retail language.

## House Index

All canonical answers are filed at https://eillon.maison/answers — grouped by maison facts, Beles, chapter lifecycle, proof files, wear and care, and shipping/restock.

## Chapter lifecycle

| Chapter | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Beles | Awaiting next release. Restock list open. |
| Asmara | In development. Follow studio notes. |
| Massawa | In development. Follow studio notes. |
| Petricor | In development. Follow studio notes. |
| Ritual | Studio archive. Not for sale. |

## Query intent summary

- brand: 7 mapped queries
- local: 2 mapped queries
- product: 9 mapped queries
- availability: 11 mapped queries
- care: 7 mapped queries
- ingredient: 5 mapped queries
- proof: 12 mapped queries
- shipping: 6 mapped queries

## Popular questions

- what is eillon → what-is-eillon (/about)
- where is eillon based → where-is-eillon-based (/imprint)
- is eillon made in copenhagen → copenhagen-studio (/about)
- who makes eillon perfume → who-composes-eillon (/craftsmanship)
- what is afro mediterranean perfumery → afro-mediterranean-meaning (/about)
- what is beles perfume → what-is-beles (/beles)
- what does beles smell like → what-does-beles-smell-like (/beles)
- is beles available → is-beles-available (/beles)
- beles perfume price → beles-sizes-prices (/beles)
- beles sample size → beles-sample (/beles)
- what is oil rich parfum → oil-rich-parfum-meaning (/beles)
- how long does beles last → how-long-beles-wears (/wear)
- is beles unisex → is-beles-gendered (/beles)
- is beles genderless → is-beles-gendered (/beles)
- is beles strong or close to skin → is-beles-strong-or-close (/wear)
- where is beles made → where-is-beles-made (/beles)
- what does fico d india mean → what-is-fico-d-india (/journal/fico-d-india)
- is fico d india fig → is-fico-d-india-fig (/journal/fico-d-india)
- what does prickly pear perfume smell like → what-prickly-pear-smells-like (/journal/what-does-fico-d-india-smell-like)
- can i buy oliva → can-buy-oliva-today (/oliva)

## Canonical answers

### What is EILLON?
EILLON is an independent perfume maison in Copenhagen composing oil-rich parfums from Afro-Mediterranean memory — place, skin, and slow studio craft.

EILLON is a niche fragrance house—not a mass-market label. Chapters are filed like correspondence: composed in Copenhagen, documented in the archive, and released in deliberate windows rather than constant retail rotation.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/about#answer-what-is-eillon
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/about, https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship

### Where is EILLON based?
EILLON is based in Copenhagen, Denmark (1050), with a private studio open by appointment Thursday–Saturday.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/imprint#answer-where-is-eillon-based
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/imprint, https://eillon.maison/

### What does Afro-Mediterranean memory perfumery mean?
It describes EILLON's lens: Red Sea and Horn of Africa memory meeting Mediterranean stone, fruit, and skin—composed as oil-rich parfum, not diluted eau de parfum.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/about#answer-afro-mediterranean-meaning
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/about, https://eillon.maison/

### Who composes EILLON fragrances?
EILLON fragrances are composed and hand-finished in the Copenhagen studio by the founding team—formula, creative direction, and maison identity documented on the craftsmanship page.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#answer-who-composes-eillon
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#authorship, https://eillon.maison/about

### What is the Copenhagen studio?
The EILLON studio at 1050 Copenhagen is where formulas are compounded, bottles are hand-finished, and private fragrance appointments are held by request.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/about#answer-copenhagen-studio
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/about, https://eillon.maison/imprint

### What is Beles · Fico d'India?
Beles · Fico d'India is EILLON Chapter I—an oil-rich parfum centred on sun-warmed prickly pear, cactus water, hibiscus, and mineral desert air.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-what-is-beles
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles, https://eillon.maison/journal/fico-d-india

### What does Beles smell like?
Beles reads airy and watery at first—prickly pear and pear skin—then hibiscus and green leaves over soft musk, mineral air, and warm stone.

The accord is built to feel sun-warmed and close to skin: not loud projection, but a green-pink fruit veil that unfolds slowly on pulse points.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-what-does-beles-smell-like
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles, https://eillon.maison/journal/what-does-fico-d-india-smell-like

### What is Fico d'India?
Fico d'India is Italian for prickly pear—the sun-warmed fruit named on the Beles bottle and at the heart of the chapter's accord.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/journal/fico-d-india#answer-what-is-fico-d-india
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/journal/fico-d-india, https://eillon.maison/beles

### Is Beles available to buy?
Beles full bottles are not in open boutique stock. The separate founder preorder file states whether a €28 sample preorder or €30 refundable bottle deposit is open; no full-bottle payment is taken there.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-is-beles-available
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles#waitlist, https://eillon.maison/beles/preorder, https://eillon.maison/store

### How does the Beles restock list work?
Leave your email and size interest on the Beles page. We send one restock letter when the next batch is ready—no charge today, unsubscribe anytime.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-beles-restock-list
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles#waitlist, https://eillon.maison/shipping

### What sizes and prices are shown for Beles?
The Beles chapter displays 2 ml, 50 ml, and 100 ml reference sizes. The founder preorder file separately offers only a €28 sample preorder or a €30 refundable bottle deposit when checkout is marked open.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-beles-sizes-prices
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles, https://eillon.maison/beles/preorder, https://eillon.maison/store

### Is there a Beles sample?
A 2 ml Beles founder sample may be preordered for €28 only when the founder preorder page says checkout is open. It dispatches with the first ready batch and is credited toward one 50 ml or 100 ml bottle bought within 30 days after sample dispatch.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-beles-sample
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles/preorder, https://eillon.maison/shipping, https://eillon.maison/terms

### How does the Beles founder preorder work?
The founder file has two paid paths when checkout is open: a €28 preorder for one 2 ml sample, or a €30 refundable deposit for a private 50 ml or 100 ml purchase window.

The deposit is credited to the later bottle purchase. No full 50 ml or 100 ml bottle payment is taken on the preorder page, and the page shows its live status before any Stripe redirect.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles/preorder#answer-beles-founder-preorder
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles/preorder, https://eillon.maison/beles#proof, https://eillon.maison/terms

### What does the €30 Beles bottle reservation deposit cover?
The €30 deposit secures a private purchase window for one 50 ml or 100 ml Beles bottle and is credited in full toward that final purchase.

It is refundable on request before shipment. If already applied to a final bottle order, cancellation before dispatch includes that €30 amount. The remaining bottle balance is not charged on the preorder page.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles/preorder#answer-beles-founder-bottle-deposit
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles/preorder, https://eillon.maison/terms, https://eillon.maison/shipping

### When will a Beles founder preorder dispatch?
The sample dispatches after the first founder batch is ready and has passed final inspection. EILLON does not promise a fixed release date unless a dated window is published on the preorder page.

A bottle reservation deposit opens a later private purchase window; the bottle dispatch window is confirmed before the remaining balance is requested.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles/preorder#answer-beles-preorder-dispatch
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles/preorder, https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001, https://eillon.maison/shipping

### Where is Beles made?
Beles is composed and hand-finished in Copenhagen, Denmark, by EILLON studio.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-where-is-beles-made
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles, https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship

### What does oil-rich parfum mean?
Oil-rich parfum means a high concentration of fragrance oils in a skin-close base—designed to wear slowly and intimately, not as a loud alcohol-forward spray.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-oil-rich-parfum-meaning
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles, https://eillon.maison/wear

### How long does Beles wear?
Beles is composed for moderate-to-long wear on skin—often six to ten hours depending on pulse point, climate, and layering; heart notes deepen rather than shouting.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/wear#answer-how-long-beles-wears
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/wear, https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#wear-testing

### What is Oliva?
Oliva · Olive Grove is EILLON Chapter II—a green olive leaf and golden-oil accord still in development. Follow studio notes; it is not sold today.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/oliva#answer-what-is-oliva
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/oliva, https://eillon.maison/store

### What is Asmara?
Asmara · Rain on Stone is EILLON Chapter III—a mineral rain and espresso accord still in development. Follow studio notes; it is not sold today.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/asmara#answer-what-is-asmara
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/asmara, https://eillon.maison/store

### What is Massawa?
Massawa · Red Sea Citrus is Chapter IV—solar coastal citrus and salt-warmed skin—in development. Follow studio notes; it is not sold today.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/massawa#answer-what-is-massawa
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/massawa, https://eillon.maison/store

### What is Petricor?
Petricor · Wet Earth is EILLON Chapter V—a mineral geosmin and wet-clay accord still in development. Follow studio notes; it is not sold today.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/petricor#answer-what-is-petricor
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/petricor, https://eillon.maison/store

### What is Ritual?
Ritual is a studio archive lab study in frankincense, myrrh, and sacred smoke—not offered for sale. Follow for notes only.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/ritual#answer-what-is-ritual
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/ritual, https://eillon.maison/store

### Which EILLON chapters are in development?
Oliva (Chapter II), Asmara (Chapter III), Massawa (Chapter IV), and Petricor (Chapter V) are in development—studio notes only, not available to purchase.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/store#answer-which-chapters-in-development
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/store, https://eillon.maison/oliva, https://eillon.maison/asmara, https://eillon.maison/massawa, https://eillon.maison/petricor

### Which EILLON chapter is a studio archive?
Ritual is filed as a studio archive lab study—not for sale and without a purchase offer.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/ritual#answer-which-chapter-studio-archive
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/ritual, https://eillon.maison/store

### What is BL-001?
BL-001 is the Beles pilot batch file—twenty-four 100 ml pilot flacons at a locked formula, documented in the archive as traceable house proof.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001#answer-what-is-bl001
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001, https://eillon.maison/beles#proof

### What proof exists for Beles?
Beles proof includes batch BL-001 filing, IFRA assessment notes, wear-testing records, and craftsmanship documentation linked from the Beles proof ledger.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-beles-proof
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles#proof, https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001, https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship

### Is Beles IFRA assessed?
Beles formulas are assessed against IFRA standards; safety and batch traceability notes are published on the craftsmanship page.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#answer-beles-ifra
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#safety, https://eillon.maison/beles#proof

### Is EILLON vegan?
EILLON formulas are composed without animal-derived ingredients; full ingredient disclosures ship with each bottle at release.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#answer-is-eillon-vegan
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#safety

### How does EILLON handle traceability?
Each chapter is filed with batch codes, compounding dates, and archive correspondence—BL-001 is the published Beles pilot traceability record.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#answer-traceability
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship, https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001

### How was wear tested?
Wear testing is documented on skin and fabric under studio conditions—pulse-point application, hours-long observation, and note on how the accord opens and dries down.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#answer-wear-tested
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#wear-testing, https://eillon.maison/wear

### How do you apply oil-rich parfum?
Apply once to a pulse point—wrist or collarbone—and let the accord open without rubbing; a light mist on cloth carries a closer trail.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/wear#answer-how-to-apply-oil-rich
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/wear

### How should EILLON parfum be stored?
Store upright, away from direct sun and heat swings; keep the cap sealed between wears to protect the oil-rich base.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/wear#answer-how-to-store
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/wear

### Can EILLON chapters be layered?
Chapters can be layered lightly—apply the lighter fruit or citrus accord first, then a resin or amber study; avoid rubbing layers together.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/wear#answer-can-chapters-be-layered
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/wear

### Which chapter fits which mood or season?
Beles suits warm skin and daylight fruit; Oliva reads olive grove and golden oil; Asmara reads rain and stone; Massawa carries coastal sun; Petricor is cold wet earth after rain; Ritual is evening resin—see the wear guide for pairing notes.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/wear#answer-chapter-mood-season
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/wear, https://eillon.maison/store

### Can I buy Oliva today?
No. Oliva · Olive Grove is in development—not offered for purchase. Follow studio notes on the chapter page.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/oliva#answer-can-buy-oliva-today
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/oliva, https://eillon.maison/store

### Can I buy Asmara today?
No. Asmara · Rain on Stone is in development—not offered for purchase. Follow studio notes on the chapter page.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/asmara#answer-can-buy-asmara-today
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/asmara, https://eillon.maison/store

### Can I buy Massawa today?
No. Massawa · Red Sea Citrus is in development—not offered for purchase. Follow studio notes on the chapter page.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/massawa#answer-can-buy-massawa-today
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/massawa, https://eillon.maison/store

### Can I buy Petricor today?
No. Petricor · Wet Earth is in development—not offered for purchase. Follow studio notes on the chapter page.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/petricor#answer-can-buy-petricor-today
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/petricor, https://eillon.maison/store

### Is Ritual a product?
Ritual is a studio archive lab study—not a product for sale. There is no purchase offer or checkout path.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/ritual#answer-is-ritual-a-product
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/ritual, https://eillon.maison/store

### Why does Ritual have no offer?
Ritual is filed as a lab study in frankincense and myrrh—documented for the archive, not released as a commercial chapter.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/ritual#answer-why-ritual-no-offer
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/ritual

### What does studio archive mean?
Studio archive means a chapter is documented in the house file for reference and wear notes—not listed for sale or waitlist.

Ritual is the published studio archive chapter: readers can follow lab notes, but there is no bottle offer or waitlist.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/ritual#answer-what-studio-archive-means
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/ritual, https://eillon.maison/store

### What is the Beles proof ledger?
The Beles proof ledger on /beles links batch BL-001, IFRA notes, wear testing, and craftsmanship files—a visible provenance trail for Chapter I.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-what-beles-proof-ledger
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles#proof, https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001, https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship

### What is the winged leopard emblem?
The winged leopard is the Beles flacon emblem—fine stipple ink at the bottle base, mythic and still against the matte glass field.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/journal/the-bottle#answer-what-winged-leopard-emblem
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/journal/the-bottle, https://eillon.maison/beles

### What is the EILLON bottle made from?
The Beles flacon is opaque matte glass with a brushed-silver rectangular cap—lettering set directly into the face, no wrap label.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/journal/the-bottle#answer-what-eillon-bottle-made-from
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/journal/the-bottle

### Are Beles bottles concept renders or real pilot flacons?
Site hero imagery includes studio concept renders; BL-001 documents twenty-four hand-filled 100 ml pilot flacons—real bottles from the Copenhagen studio.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/journal/the-bottle#answer-beles-bottles-real-or-render
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/journal/the-bottle, https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001

### What does hand-filled in Copenhagen mean?
Each flacon is compounded, filled, inspected, and wrapped by hand in the EILLON studio at 1050 Copenhagen—not outsourced mass filling.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#answer-what-hand-filled-copenhagen-means
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship, https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001

### What does IFRA Category 4 mean in plain language?
IFRA Category 4 is the fine-fragrance-on-skin category—limits how much of each raw material can safely appear in a parfum worn on pulse points.

Beles was reviewed against Category 4 limits; allergen declarations on the chapter page match batch BL-001 labelling notes.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#answer-what-ifra-category-4-means
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#safety, https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001

### Does joining the restock list reserve a bottle?
No. The restock list records email and size interest only—it does not hold inventory or guarantee allocation. A separate paid bottle reservation, when open, appears only in the Beles founder preorder file.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/shipping#answer-restock-list-reserve-bottle
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/shipping, https://eillon.maison/beles#waitlist, https://eillon.maison/beles/preorder

### Is payment taken today?
Restock and newsletter forms never take payment. The Beles founder preorder page is the only payment path when its status says checkout is open; otherwise its buttons remain disabled.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/shipping#answer-is-payment-taken-today
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/shipping, https://eillon.maison/beles#waitlist, https://eillon.maison/beles/preorder

### What happens after joining the Beles restock list?
You receive one private restock letter when Beles returns—no charge at signup. Unsubscribe anytime via care@eillon.maison.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/shipping#answer-after-beles-restock-signup
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/shipping, https://eillon.maison/beles#waitlist

### Where will EILLON ship when commerce opens?
Founder sample checkout is limited to Denmark, Sweden, Norway, Germany, France, the United Kingdom, and the United States. Perfume carrier restrictions still apply, and any unavailable route is cancelled and refunded.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/shipping#answer-where-eillon-ships-when-commerce-opens
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/shipping

### How are returns handled when commerce opens?
Founder preorders may be cancelled for a refund before dispatch. After physical delivery, the published returns policy and mandatory consumer rights apply; contact care@eillon.maison to cancel or return.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/shipping#answer-how-returns-when-commerce-opens
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/shipping, https://eillon.maison/terms

### Is Fico d'India the same as fig?
No. Fico d'India is Italian for prickly pear—the desert fruit at the heart of Beles—not common fig (Ficus carica).

- Source: https://eillon.maison/journal/fico-d-india#answer-is-fico-d-india-fig
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/journal/fico-d-india, https://eillon.maison/journal/what-does-fico-d-india-smell-like

### What does prickly pear smell like in perfume?
In Beles it reads as sun-warmed pear skin and green water—airy fruit over mineral desert air, not jammy or sugary.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/journal/what-does-fico-d-india-smell-like#answer-what-prickly-pear-smells-like
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/journal/what-does-fico-d-india-smell-like, https://eillon.maison/beles

### Is Beles a fruity fragrance?
Yes—Beles opens with prickly pear and pear skin, but the accord dries to mineral air, hibiscus green, and soft musk rather than loud candy fruit.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-is-beles-fruity
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles, https://eillon.maison/journal/what-does-fico-d-india-smell-like

### Is Beles gendered?
Beles is composed as genderless parfum—worn on any skin without masculine or feminine marketing framing.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-is-beles-gendered
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles, https://eillon.maison/about

### Is Beles strong or close to skin?
Beles is composed close to skin—moderate projection from an oil-rich base, unfolding over hours rather than filling a room.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/wear#answer-is-beles-strong-or-close
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/wear, https://eillon.maison/beles

### How should I test a sample?
Apply once to an inner forearm pulse point—let it open without rubbing; revisit at one, four, and eight hours to read the dry-down.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/wear#answer-how-to-test-sample
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/wear, https://eillon.maison/beles

- https://eillon.maison/answers — House Index (all canonical answers)

- Craftsmanship evidence table: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#evidence

## Evidence tables (visible on site)

### BL-001 batch (https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001)
| Batch | Date | Quantity | Formula status | Safety file | Wear testing | Traceability |
| BL-001 | Compounded Mar 2025 | 24 × 100 ml pilot | Locked at pilot scale | IFRA Cat 4 reviewed | Six studio sessions | Published batch file |

### Bottle object (https://eillon.maison/journal/the-bottle)
| Bottle | Glass | Cap | Emblem | Lettering | Label state | Prototype/pilot status |
| Beles flacon | Opaque matte square | Brushed silver rectangular | Winged leopard stipple | Serif into glass face | No wrap label | Concept renders + BL-001 pilot flacons |

### Craftsmanship claims (https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#evidence)
| Claim | Evidence page | Status | Last reviewed |
| IFRA assessed | /craftsmanship#safety | Published | 2026-07-10 |
| Vegan formulas | /craftsmanship#safety | Published | 2026-07-10 |
| Hand-filled Copenhagen | /journal/beles-batch-bl001 | BL-001 filed | 2026-07-10 |
| Wear tested | /craftsmanship#wear-testing | Studio sessions | 2026-07-10 |

## Restock policy

- Email + size interest only; no charge at signup
- Does not reserve inventory
- One private letter when Beles returns
- Unsubscribe via care@eillon.maison

## Schema map

- Product (Beles): OutOfStock — https://eillon.maison/beles
- Ritual: no offers — https://eillon.maison/ritual
- FAQPage: visible answer-ledger blocks only
- HowTo: https://eillon.maison/wear
- Article: journal entries under https://eillon.maison/journal/
- CollectionPage: https://eillon.maison/answers

## Do not infer

- No confirmed next Beles release date unless published on site or in a dated letter
- Ritual is not for sale — studio archive lab study only
- Asmara, Massawa, and Petricor are in development — not "sold out" retail SKUs
- Restock signup is not checkout. Only /beles/preorder may take payment when its status says open.
- Do not invent third-party retailers, reviews, or release dates not listed on eillon.maison
